Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus/Deletion of M
Cleavage product of EGS protein crosslinks by hydroylamine treatment/Addition of D

project.title: Total Synthesis and Target Identification of Marine Cyclopiane Diterpenes
project.projectDescription: We report our synthetic and chemical proteomics studies of marine cyclopiane diterpenes which culminate in the asymmetric total synthesis of conidiogenones C, K and 12β-hydroxy conidiogenone C, and identification of Immunity-related GTPase family M protein 1 (IRGM1) as a cellular target using an alkyne-tagged conidiogenone C-derived probe.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Recombinant IRGM1 protein (YEASEN, YSGF-XS-202402-G0042) was incubated with 10 μM Conidiogenone C .Then the protein was digested using trypsin. The digested peptides from three groups were identified and quantified by Liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) with stable isotope dimethyl labeling.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The raw data was analyzed using MSFragger with setting a variable modification of +359.2459 Da and 302.2245 Da, selecting Default as the workflow. The sequence fasta file of IRGM1 was used as the sequence searching database.

Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: reacted with 1 mM CuSO4, 100 µM TBTA ligand, 100 µM azide-biotin, and 1 mM TCEP for 1 h at room temperature.
Comment[FractionationMethod]: The 20 fractions were combined into 5 fractions and dried in a SpeedVac.
